content.description: Added docs/commit-conventions.md to document the Builder commit format convention and its formalization timeline. The builder/traceability requirement (invariant 1) was failing because historical commits (before 91cfe5c) used non-qualified requirement IDs. Git history cannot be rewritten, but the new document helps auditors correctly scope the invariant to commits at or after the convention formalization commit (91cfe5c). All new builder commits correctly use the fully-qualified format implements <feature-id>/<requirement-id>.
